zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，等待方向确认
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持窄幅整理，价格运行于2095美元附近，24小时跌幅有限，但整体重心略有下移。现价低于20日均线2110附近，说明短线趋势仍偏空，市场情绪以谨慎观望为主。

从技术指标看，MACD处于零轴下方且维持负值，显示空头动能尚未完全释放，短周期仍存在回调压力。RSI数据暂未形成有效参考，但价格连续受压于均线，反映多头主动性不足。

关键支撑位首先关注2090美元一线，若跌破，后续可能测试2075附近低位；上方阻力集中在2105至2115区域，也是20日均线所在位置。只有重新站稳该区域，市场才有望恢复反弹节奏。

操作上，短线交易者宜以区间思路为主，靠近支撑位轻仓低吸，接近阻力位注意止盈。若后续放量突破2115美元，可考虑顺势跟进；若跌破2090，则需警惕空头进一步扩大优势。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently exhibiting a mild consolidation with a slight bearish tilt after failing to sustain levels above the 2110 region. Price action remains compressed within a narrow intraday range, indicating indecision among market participants. Despite limited volatility, repeated rejections near the upper boundary suggest weakening bullish momentum. The broader short-term structure leans neutral-to-bearish unless a decisive breakout occurs above resistance.

Momentum indicators reinforce the lack of strong bullish conviction. MACD remains in negative territory at -4.12693, signaling persistent downside pressure, while the absence of RSI data limits overbought or oversold confirmation. Price trading below the 20-period SMA at 2110.151 further supports a short-term bearish bias. This alignment suggests sellers are marginally dominant despite the overall low volatility environment. This keeps intraday rallies vulnerable to quick rejection.

Immediate support is concentrated near the intraday low at 2090.27, with a sustained break potentially opening room toward the psychological 2080 zone and deeper liquidity near 2050. On the upside, resistance is clearly defined at 2102.79, followed by the 2110 SMA20 level, which remains a key pivot for trend direction. A rejection from these zones would likely reinforce continued range-bound trading.

Trading conditions favor a range-based approach until a breakout confirms directional bias. Long positions may be considered only on a sustained move above 2110 with volume confirmation, targeting 2125–2150, while invalidation sits back below 2100. Alternatively, short setups become more attractive if price loses 2090 with follow-through, targeting 2080 and below. Risk management remains critical given the compressed volatility and frequent false breakouts in this zone.
